issues.description: Missing protective effect: 'None of your Characters can be K.O.'d by effects until the start of your next turn' must be represented as a separate effect with GiveKeyword (protection/immunity) or custom condition logic with duration DuringYourTurn. Current DSL only includes DrawCard and TrashFromHand.

Incorrect action order and missing condition: DrawCard and TrashFromHand should occur AFTER the protection expires (at start of next turn), not immediately on play. Needs proper sequencing with duration or conditional timing.
